expectations.text: Report follows boost template (P-XXX IDs, Executive Summary, Source section)
expectations.evidence: Full boost report with Source, Executive Summary, P-001 through P-012, Cross-Cutting Observations, Not Recommended
Covers key guide principles: context/motivation, XML tags, few-shot examples, tool usage, Claude 4.6 characteristics, subagent management

expectations.text: Proposals reference specific skills and file paths
expectations.evidence: Each proposal specifies target skills and files (e.g. P-003: 'references/phase-a-planning.md, references/phase-b-implementation.md, references/integration-and-review.md')

expectations.text: Proposals are actionable with concrete changes
expectations.evidence: Before/after prompt examples for P-001, specific Step references for P-003 (Step 1-B, Step 5, Step 18-B), XML tag structure examples in P-010
All 5 experts with consensus per proposal (e.g. 'Prompt Engineer(주도), Quality & Safety Guardian(강력 동의)')

expectations.text: Includes Not Recommended section with rejected ideas
expectations.evidence: 5 rejected ideas: prefill migration, adaptive thinking, frontend design, structured outputs, thinking tag examples — each with reasoning
